case_title: MARK ELCONIN et al VS. CDC SOFTWARE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER ELCONIN, MARK SMITH, AL AS TO RESPONDENT CDC SOFTWARE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ELCONIN, MARK SMITH, AL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CDC SOFTWARE, INC. $512,321.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $512,321.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
